title: サウジアラビアRCの後に・鴻鵠之志

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: We secured a place on the scoreboard, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No, we did not. And we will not be able to afford
this kind of defeat on the road ahead.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Inexperience cost me this race. I admit it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But if we are to take the Classic Triple Crown, we
cannot let this happen again.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Remember, those crowns are the least I must
accomplish. Let us claim that first great goal
without fail.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Next, we challenge the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as we solidify our resolve to enter the Satsuki
Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock...

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: President, um...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's you again. What did you think of my
performance?

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text:
You were amazing... and so confident! You're way
above the rest of us...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm? Now, don't—

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: Sorry! I-I didn't mean.. That is... I should be going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Don't worry about it. I'll speak with her later.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Right now, we should review today's performance.
Time is money, as they say, and it would not do
to waste it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf and I put our heads together for a
while and review her race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as we arrive back at the academy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VROOOOOM! Screeeeech!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm? An engine this loud could only mean...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heya, Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky. Just as I thought.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
A little birdie told me you're finally going for the
Classic Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That's one gnarly goal! I hope you pull it off! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Maruzensky the Beast, the so-called "Hot
Rod" who has taken the world by storm, and
made her debut even earlier than Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Emperor on one side and the Beast on
the other, it's hard to hide my excitement as a
trainer. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Gnarly... hmmm. Perhaps... no, that's not funny
enough.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You're not trying to turn that into a pun, are you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You could pull a muscle doing that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I thought it might be a worthy challenge... as well
as a potent addition to my arsenal if I could pull
it off.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, not cool! You can't just take the things I say
and turn them into gags!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha... My apologies.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two seem like they're on good terms. I can't
help but notice that Symboli Rudolf looks a little
more relaxed in Maruzensky's company.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, shoot! Gotta dash! I'm keeping the teacher
waiting!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I think the school found out about me using an
employee parking spot.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it's not like anyone else was using it!
What's the problem, right?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Are you certain you want to ask the president of
the student council? You might not like the
answer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Aw, man... Why do you have to such a square?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Guess I'd better be going. Hasta la vista, baby!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha... As energetic as ever.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I see her as less of a friend and more as... an
object of interest, one might say.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As you are surely aware, her effortless strength is
causing quite the stir in the racing world.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I regard her as a worthy contributor to the future I
mean to build.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And besides, I find her... intriguing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: She stirs my most basic racing instincts.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I think of myself as drawing strength from many
things. My dreams, my ideals, the expectations of
the students I lead.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But I cannot help but wonder... if I were to meet
her on the track, fueled only by my thirst for
victory, who would prevail?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Which of us would truly prove the strongest?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For just an instant, something shines in her eyes,
but it quickly fades.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But I have a long way to go before I'm qualified
to speak of such things.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now then, I ought to get back to work. I'm going
to return to the academy. Is that all right?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But of course. There is always more to be done. If
that is all, then I will take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she were to race against Maruzensky as she is
now—a racer pursuing an ideal—she would
undoubtedly compete as the "Emperor."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But after today, a part of me hopes that someday
she has the chance to compete simply as Symboli
Rudolf instead.
